configurations.name: dev
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use >/dev/null 2>&1 || nvm use 24 >/dev/null 2>&1; exec npm run dev -- --port "${PORT:-4321}"

configurations.name: preview
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use >/dev/null 2>&1 || nvm use 24 >/dev/null 2>&1; exec npm run preview -- --port 4321
